questionHtml: Using the information provided in Table 1, calculate the rate of unemployment for Burundi in 2019.
markschemeHtml:
74 7504 908 500+74 750×100

Any valid working should be rewarded with [1].

= 1.5%

An answer of 1.5 or 1.5% without working is sufficient for [1].

N.B. An answer of 1.52 arises because of incorrect working and so should be awarded [0].

meta.title: Using the information provided in Table 1, calculate the rate of unemployment for Burundi in 2019.
